feedback.text: Google upcoming policies on app installation are a clear violation of my customer rights and does not comply with digital fairness. I bought a device and must have total control on what and how I install. This attack on my rights is unacceptable. Google is an evil company, they are unscrupulous and unethical. They market this change as something good but anyone with a brain can read between the lines and clearly see the final onjective: Google wants more power over your phone and more MONEY by puttting in place ridiculous roadblocks and limitations on developing and installing apps outside the Play Store.
